transcript: Speaker A: Planning to take an English proficiency test to study abroad? Join millions of students who have already taken the Duolingo English Test. Now recognized by over 5500 institutions. DET can be taken anytime, anywhere. 1-hour online test, 2 days to get results! And not just that! The Duolingo English Test only costs 1/3 of other English tests. Sign up now and try out our free practice tests.

summary: The ad promotes the Duolingo English Test (DET) as a convenient, fast, and affordable option for students planning to study abroad. It highlights that the test is recognized by over 5,500 institutions, takes only one hour online, provides results in two days, and costs a fraction of other English tests. The call to action encourages viewers to sign up and try free practice tests at englishtest.duolingo.com.
